## Type of change
- [ ] New vertical plugin (`lexsis-{name}-skills`)
- [ ] New core skill (knowledge or operational)
- [ ] New command
- [ ] Fix/improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/tooling change

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill `.md` file has valid YAML frontmatter (`description`, `allowed-tools`)
- [ ] Registered in `manifest.json` (if new skill/command)
- [ ] Registered in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` (if new plugin)
- [ ] `plugin.json` is valid JSON with required fields
- [ ] Cross-platform files updated (`codex/`, `cursor/`, `gpt/` if applicable)
- [ ] File paths in manifest match actual file locations
- [ ] Tested locally (installed plugin, ran command)
